string 2:
Ah, you return at last. There are new developments
that I need to share with you.

This young lady captured Kuga and questioned him,
but listen to this...

It seems that someone was providing public safety
with the Digimon to use in their experiments.
The name Kuga mentioned was... Dianamon.

A former resident of Central Town... who once went
by the name of "Lunamon."

A Digimon, selling her own kind... I hear Dianamon
calls the Cosmic Area home now.

If only Minervamon was here, the situation would be
different. What in the world could've caused this?

Apparently, it wasn't just Digimon Kuga was getting.
He also reportedly got their "structural information."

By incorporating that, apparently the weapon became
capable of generating an enormous amount of power.
I'll look into that one.

You go to the Digital World and find Dianamon. Perhaps you'll 
be able to discover the mastermind behind this war.

I'm sure you can ask MasterBlimpmon to take you to
the Cosmic Area.

This Cosmic Area was almost entirely uninhabited by
Digimon, partly due to the harsh environment.

Lord Apollomon and Lady Dianamon chose this place as
their base to build up their strength against the Titans.

However, the two have fallen out, and the current
situation is quite tense.
Although it's rumored that they were once quite close...

I hear Lady Minervamon, who once served as peacemaker, has
been imprisoned somewhere, leaving them with no mediator.
What? You say Lady Dianamon is... selling Digimon to humans?!

Wretched cur! You dare spread baseless rumors?! Why, I have
a mind to silence that insolent mouth of yours permanently!
...Hey! There you are! I've been looking all over for you.

Sorry about my pal here. Still learning the ropes and all.
I'll set the kid straight, so cut us some slack, okay?

A friend of Pumpkinmon's, are you...? I suppose I can
overlook your breach of conduct this once.

Just know that in the future, such persiflage could
result in full-scale conflict.

The name's Pumpkinmon. I'm going around trying to
ease this tense situation we got brewing here.

I'm sure you got your reasons for saying what you did,
but just try not to make things worse.
What's that? You wanna see Lady Dianamon?

Can you help Lady Dianamon and Lord Apollomon
reconcile? I can show you the way!

You will?! You'll help me out? Then let's get out there
and squash this beef!

That said... Going to see Lord Apollomon and Lady
Dianamon isn't gonna be easy.
They're both mad as can be... just like kids having a spat.

It seems Lady Dianamon's heart is closed tight, so
I think it'd be better to go see Lord Apollomon first!

Let's talk to Lord Apollomon first and see if there's a
chance of making up.

Now that that's settled, let's ask those two to help us
get to Lord Apollomon!
...And who is this, now?
I already know what you're going to say.
You want me to make up with Dianamon, yes?

Dianamon is the one who made things worse.
You outsiders need to get lost, now.

I told you to leave, didn't I?! Do you need to get burnt
before you figure it out?!
You're... pretty strong, huh...
Wait! Could you be... Are you—?!
Do you remember me?
You heard the rumors about Dianamon, too?
I see... I didn't want to believe it, but...

If it's come to this... I gotta take care of Dianamon
with my own two hands. It's my duty, as family...!

Hey, is this talk of you handing over Digimon to the
humans true? Well?! Say something!

You're always like this... You just say what you want to say,
with no regard for anyone else!
Always, always, ALWAYS blind to what I feel!
Even though you can't do anything on your own!
Can't... do anything... you say?
Yup, there it is.

For as long as I can remember, you've always treated me like this!
Like I'm some incompetent kid who needs his hand held!
I can't take it any more!
You know what, forget this! I was an idiot to try to make up with you!
Let's go, I'm ready to fight!
What in the world made you change?!

You were right by my side, but you couldn't see anything, huh.
You have no idea what the dark side of the moon is like.
It's too late, I can't admit it now...
That I wanted you to notice...
It's too late! All of it!
*panting*
*panting*
Why... you, of all people...?
I'm sorry.

I finally get it. It took a massive fight for me to realize,
but you're suffering from something...

I'm your family, but I didn't notice at all... I know it's late,
but could you talk to me... please?

...Junomon was the one who instructed me to send
Digimon to the human world.

They were meant to act as envoys—emissaries so that
the humans could understand us better.
I had no idea the horrible things that were happening to them...

I went to Minerva for advice on what to do... but, after
I talked to her, she disappeared and never returned.

I lost the capacity to tell who was really on our side...
I even came to doubt you, my other half...
Will you forgive me?

No... this is my fault. I should have been by your side, 
to light your way...

It's because I didn't have the courage... the courage to
tell you  how I feel.

Let's go question Junomon together.
I'm sure Minerva is there too.
